reason: Chairman: '继续修复'. Fixed 7 MEDIUM bugs from event 000019 audit. BUG-019 (workdir empty string silently broken): App.tsx now treats both null and '' as 'needs workdir' — triggers the WorkdirSetup dialog instead of rendering a dashboard with no workdir behind it. BUG-052 (metadata schema inconsistency): crates/agent-core/src/tool/nwt.rs renamed `"created"` → `"created_at"` to match the desktop's set_workdir_with_nwt command and the upstream nwt CLI. BUG-010 (panic logs hard-excluded): added `include_panic_logs` param to search_log Tauri command + a checkbox in SearchBugPanel UI (default unchecked). The user can opt in when hunting a crash. New i18n keys for both zh-CN/en-US. BUG-012 (root path accepted): added components-count guard in set_workdir_with_nwt that rejects paths with ≤1 component (i.e. `/` on Unix). BUG-031 (CSP doesn't include custom origins): widened connect-src from a fixed list to `https:` — still blocks http:// but allows any custom-provider HTTPS origin. BUG-041 (nwt index race): added INDEX_LOCK Mutex around update_index read-modify-write. BUG-042 (nwt next_id TOCTOU): wrapped next_id under INDEX_LOCK + use OpenOptions::create_new for atomic file create, retrying with bumped IDs up to 100 times. Added 4 new tests: e2e_boundary_search_log_includes_panic_when_opted_in, e2e_boundary_atomic_rejects_root_path, e2e_boundary_atomic_accepts_nested_path, e2e_boundary_metadata_schema_consistent_created_at. Total: 36 E2E pass (was 32). Workspace 134 pass. pnpm typecheck clean. Tauri NSIS build: Flowntier_0.4.0_x64-setup.exe produced.
